name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support for all landholding farmer families.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments.

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
description: Health insurance cover for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Providing LPG connections to women from BPL households.
benefits: Free LPG connection and first refill.

name: Stand Up India
description: Facilitating bank loans to SC/ST and Women entrepreneurs.
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore.

name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Providing affordable housing for the urban poor and middle class.
benefits: Subsidized interest rate on housing loans.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for the girl child as part of 'Beti Bachao, Beti Padhao'.
benefits: High interest rate and tax benefits for girl child education/marriage.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for citizens in the unorganized sector.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month.

name: PM MUDRA Yojana
description: Loans for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Loans up to ₹10 lakh under Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun categories.

name: PM Vidyalaxmi
description: Financial support to meritorious students for higher education.
benefits: Collateral-free, guarantor-free education loans with interest subvention.

name: Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS)
description: Secure government-backed investment for retirees.
benefits: High interest rate (8.2%) with quarterly payouts.

name: PM Vishwakarma
description: Support for traditional artisans and craftspeople.
benefits: Skill training, toolkits, and collateral-free loans at 5% interest.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance for bank account holders.
benefits: ₹2 lakh cover for accidental death for only ₹20 premium per year.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance cover for bank account holders.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life cover for a low annual premium.

name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
description: One-time small savings scheme for women.
benefits: Fixed interest rate of 7.5% for 2 years with tax benefits.

name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Pension scheme for senior citizens managed by LIC.
benefits: Guaranteed annual return for 10 years.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Skill certification scheme to enable youth to take up industry-relevant training.
benefits: Free skill training and certification for better jobs.

name: Ayushman Bharat (Senior Citizens 70+)
description: Universal health insurance for all citizens aged 70 and above.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per year regardless of income.

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Micro-credit facility for street vendors.
benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000 for urban livelihoods.

name: PM Shram Yogi Maandhan
description: Old age protection and social security for unorganized workers.
benefits: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST
description: Financial assistance to students belonging to SC/ST categories.
benefits: Reimbursement of tuition fees and maintenance allowance.
